system.description: Bitter Orange Remedy: This is prepared using a combination of bitter orange and magnolia bark as well as 13 other ingredients. It produces a liquid, one sip of which will restore balance to Qi (it eliminates 5 Imbalance Points per sip). However it is quite unstable, lasting only twenty minutes after brewing. Brew Rating: TN 6.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 2: Rules
